description: A wide-angle photograph capturing the vastness of the open sea under a twilight sky. The sky transitions from a light blue at the top, fading into soft orange and yellow hues along the horizon. Scattered, elongated grey clouds are visible across the horizon. The sea occupies the lower two-thirds of the image, appearing dark blue with distinct ripples on its surface, reflecting the dim light from the sky. No land is visible, emphasising the open water environment. This photograph serves as a visual example for the "Open sea" category (8.4.1) in a Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) nomenclature guideline.
